incidents.justification: the support bot made up a discount that was never actually offered so it comes under hallucination and that makes it a reliability issue.
The chat assistant was logging every message of the user without the user's consent making it a privacy violation
A deepfake of the business leader was made and through it, misinformation was spread hence this is an accountability issue.
This model has a gender bias as the applicants who attended certain women's colleges were down ranked, this affects the fairness.
The moderation system was against a certain community making it biased and violating the inclusivity policy.
Scammers breached the security through a fake phone call and made a staff member authorize a wire transfer. breaches security

stretch_notes: X (twitter) users used the grok ai to create deepfake images of celebrities. Groks policy was later updated and it no longer accepts such prompts.
